subject: grammar
title: Conditional Conjunctions
instruction: Choose the correct words to complete the sentences.

questions.text: I'll put my umbrella in my bag ___ it rains later.
___ you pay me in advance, I'll buy the tickets for you.
I'm going to get fat ___ I stop eating so much chocolate.
You must follow the instructions accurately ___ you want to risk damaging the machine.
When I travel on planes I always put my toothbrush in my hand luggage ___ my suitcase gets lost.
Ice skating is fun ___ you are willing to fall over a lot!
Dear Mr Brown, I am writing to inform you that your library books are overdue. ___ you return them immediately, you will not be fined.
I've just signed the contract for the job in Indonesia, starting in April. ___ I move there, I'll have to sell my car.
I wouldn't stay out in the sun too long ___ I were you.
I don't really like going to parties ___ I know most people there.
